name: Pilate
oracleText:
When Pilate enters the battlefield, choose one -
• Target opponent sacrifices a creature.
• Target opponent discards a card.
flavorText: "I am innocent of the blood of this just person." — Matthew 27:24
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "Christ before Pilate" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Washer of Hands

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.sourceNotes: Pilate’s role is represented cleanly through this Tissot trial scene.
